title: tragopogon montanus
intro: Tragopogon montanus, also known as the alpine salsify or mountain goat's beard, is a species of flowering plant in the sunflower family (Asteraceae). It is believed to have medicinal properties, primarily due to its saponin and flavonoid content, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The plant is said to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Tragopogon montanus can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, with some herbalists recommending it for its potential anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties.
